prompt: Create a vibrant anime-style cyber idol concert illustration of Hatsune Miku in a futuristic holographic data-stage. Show a young virtual singer with extremely long flowing twin-tails in bright turquoise cyan, wearing large black headphones with hot-pink neon accents, a sleeveless silver-gray Vocaloid-inspired top with teal trim and a teal necktie, black detached arm sleeves with glowing digital equalizer patterns, a short black pleated skirt with teal bands and tiny circuit-like display details, and glossy black thigh-high boots. Her face should be covered by a soft rectangular blur/mosaic censor block, while the rest of the character is sharply detailed. Pose her mid-performance, holding a black microphone with a teal-and-pink ring near her mouth in her left hand, and extending her right hand toward the viewer in an inviting dynamic gesture. Add a red “01” tattoo/marking on her upper left arm with small Vocaloid-style text beneath it. The composition is vertical 2:3, waist-to-thigh framing with dramatic perspective, hair ribbons and twin-tails sweeping across the image in large arcs. Background: an immersive deep-blue digital cyberspace stage filled with glowing cyan grid lines, transparent HUD panels, floating music-note icons, waveform/data rectangles, neon particles, and luminous circular light trails around her legs. Include exactly 2 readable floating sign panels: one large cyan panel on the upper left reading 01 HATSUNE MIKU, and one smaller panel on the upper right showing 01. Use intense electric-blue and cyan lighting with magenta accents, high contrast, glossy highlights, detailed anime rendering, crisp linework, depth of field, and energetic concert atmosphere. Avoid extra characters, avoid extra readable text, no watermark, no logo outside the described markings.
